title: Domestos Power 5 Ocean Toilet Rim Block toilet blocks that clean at full power for up to 300 flushes up to 3x more limescale prevention* 5 x 55 g
features: Long Lasting Protection: Provides powerful cleaning action for up to 300 flushes, ensuring your toilet stays fresh and hygienic for an extended period
Limescale Prevention: Features enhanced triple action formula that helps prevent limescale buildup, keeping your toilet bowl clean and stain-free
Ocean Fresh Scent: Releases a refreshing ocean fragrance with every flush, maintaining a pleasant bathroom environment throughout the day
Easy Application: Convenient rim block design that easily attaches to your toilet bowl, providing consistent cleaning performance with each flush
Complete Coverage: 5-pack of 55g blocks ensures comprehensive cleaning and maintenance of your toilet for several months of continuous use
description: Experience superior toilet cleaning power with Domestos Power 5 Ocean Toilet Rim Block. This effective cleaning solution provides continuous cleaning action for up to 300 flushes, ensuring your toilet stays fresh and hygienic. The innovative formula offers triple the limescale prevention capability, helping to maintain your toilet's cleanliness and protect against buildup. Each pack contains 5 blocks of 55g each, delivering long-lasting performance and ocean-fresh fragrance for your bathroom.
